name: Rocky Road Candy
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Pecans or walnuts; finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Combine chocolate and butter in the top of a double boiler. Bring water to a boil. Reduce heat to low. Cook until chocolate melts. Cool to lukewarm. Stir in marshmallows and pecans. Shape into 2 rolls, 2 inches in diameter. Chill. Slice into 1/2-inch slices. Yield: about 3 dozen.
MICROWAVE DIRECTIONS:
Combine chocolate and butter in a 2-quart glass bowl. Microwave at MEDIUM (50% power) for 3-1/2 to 4 minutes or until morsels are softened. Stir well. Cool to lukewarm. Stir in marshmallows and pecans. Shape into 2 rolls, 2 inches in diameter. Chill. Cut into 1/2-inch slices.
